escalation.rationale: Multiple active conflicts with US-Iran fire exchange, Ukraine-Russia ceasefire amid drone strikes, and continued Israel-Lebanon hostilities.

ticker_items: Trump announces 3-day Russia-Ukraine ceasefire for Victory Day
US strikes Iranian oil tankers amid fragile ceasefire talks
Ukrainian drones hit Russian energy targets 1,700km inside border
Israeli strikes kill 19 in Lebanon despite ceasefire claims
Iran attacks UAE with drones and ballistic missiles

eastern_europe.description: Ukraine launched 264 drones targeting Russian regions during Moscow's declared Victory Day ceasefire.
Ukrainian forces conducted 887 drone strikes and 1,365 ceasefire violations according to Russian Defense Ministry.
Ukrainian drone strikes hit Russian energy targets reaching 1,700km inside border.

middle_east.description: Iranian forces attacked three American destroyers in the Strait of Hormuz during ceasefire negotiations.
US forces struck Iranian oil tankers and military targets in response to attacks on destroyers.
Israeli forces killed 31 people including a rescue worker in southern Lebanon operations.
Iranian forces attacked three American destroyers in the Strait of Hormuz during fragile ceasefire.
Hezbollah carried out 13 targeted military operations against invading Israeli troops in Lebanese territory.
Israel ramped up airstrikes across Lebanon despite ceasefire agreement.
US warplane disabled two Iranian tankers to enforce port blockade.
Iran launched two ballistic missiles and three drones against UAE targets.
Israeli airstrikes killed at least 19 people across Lebanon.
Hezbollah launched 13 strikes against Israeli forces in southern Lebanon.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

middle_east.text: The ceasefire with Iran was still in place despite an Iranian attack on three American destroyers in the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday, which he dismissed as 'a trifle.'
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Victory Day truce will be 'beginning of end' for Russia-Ukraine conflict
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Germany requested jet fuel assistance from Israel as Hormuz crisis disrupts European aviation fuel supplies. The shipments will be coordinated through domestic refining companies to address critical aviation fuel shortages.
Pakistan reportedly asked the US not to launch operations to open the Strait of Hormuz during ongoing negotiations with Iran. Trump confirmed Pakistan's involvement in mediating the ceasefire talks.

Estimated 11,000 North Korean soldiers were sent to fight in Russia's war against Ukraine. North Korea revised its constitution to drop reunification references and designate Kim Jong Un as head of nuclear forces.

US Secretary of State Rubio met with PM Meloni in Rome amid diplomatic tensions over the Iran war and Vatican disputes straining US-Italy ties. The visit aimed to recalibrate relationships following weeks of friction.

Poland's intelligence accused Russia of cyber sabotage against military and civilian infrastructure, including water treatment plants. Poland signed the SAFE agreement as part of broader European security initiatives.

financial.notes: Iran war has redirected 70% of Red Sea freight traffic around Cape of Good Hope, reshaping global trade routes.

update_log.text: US strikes Iranian oil tankers while Trump claims ceasefire remains intact
Israeli airstrikes kill 19 across Lebanon despite ceasefire claims
Iran launches ballistic missiles and drones against UAE, wounding 3
Trump announces 3-day Russia-Ukraine ceasefire for Victory Day period
Ukrainian drones strike Russian energy infrastructure 1,700km inside border
US and Iranian forces clashed in Gulf and Strait of Hormuz with both sides accusing ceasefire breaches
Trump announced three-day Russia-Ukraine ceasefire with prisoner swap confirmed by both sides
Hezbollah launched 13 strikes against Israeli forces advancing into southern Lebanon
Russia reported 1,365 Ukrainian ceasefire violations including 887 drone strikes
US and Iran exchange fire in Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing ceasefire negotiations
Israel kills 31 in southern Lebanon including rescue worker during operations
Ukraine launches 264 drones against 16 Russian regions during Victory Day truce
US approves $373.6 million precision bomb package for Ukraine
